deck.author: OpenAI Codex
deck.subject: Demonstration presentation
deck.title: Intro to Aalto University
deck.outline:
1. Intro to Aalto University - Aalto University is a multidisciplinary institution combining art, design, science, and technology to educate future thought-leaders.
2. Six Schools of Innovation - Aalto operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, and Science, fostering creative sustainability.
3. Open Learning for All - Aalto offers open courses and lifelong learning beyond degree programs.

slide-01.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University is a multidisciplinary institution combining art, design, science, and technology to educate future thought-leaders. without reducing readability.
slide-01.mustInclude: Aalto University is a multidisciplinary institution combining art, design, science, and technology to educate future thought-leaders.
slide-01.notes: Use official Aalto University branding and mission statement from the main website content.
slide-01.title: Intro to Aalto University
slide-01.value: Audience understands Aalto as an interdisciplinary university, not a single-discipline campus.

slide-02.layoutHint: Use high-contrast text on images showing campus architecture or scientific equipment to maintain WCAG AA compliance.
slide-02.mustInclude: Aalto operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, and Science, fostering creative sustainability.
slide-02.notes: Use official Aalto University branding and mission statement from the main website content.
slide-02.title: Six Schools of Innovation
slide-02.value: Audience sees the six-school structure as the mechanism behind Aalto's cross-field work.

slide-03.layoutHint: Use high-contrast text on images showing diverse campus activities or open events to maintain WCAG AA compliance.
slide-03.mustInclude: Aalto offers open courses and lifelong learning beyond degree programs.
slide-03.notes: Use the Lifewide Learning and Open University details from the provided Aalto source material.
slide-03.title: Open Learning for All
slide-03.value: Audience recognizes Aalto's commitment to accessible education and community engagement.
